message.content:
@startuml
actor "DASH client" as D1
participant "License proxy" as LP
database "License server" as LS

LP ->> D1 : Get license
activate LP
note right of LP: Check if user is authorized\n(Proprietary proof of authorization attached)
deactivate LP
LS --> LP : License
activate LS
LP -->> D1 : License
@enduml
